/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/ic_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/cic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/poisson_fft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/gradient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/force_interp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/diagnostics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_parallel.dir/src/simulation.cpp.o -o pm_parallel  -lfftw3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfftw3_omp.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
